TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[550.560-620.983] interviewee: started to work as a pharmacist in two pharmacies. During the time, I was naturally very active in Zionist youth organizations from childhood on. And I was five years old.
[620.983-623.960] interviewer: Tell me a little bit about which ones you belonged to--
[623.960-669.430] interviewee: The first I belonged was on the German time yet. I belonged to the Blau-Weiss. It was a German Jewish youth organization. And

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
And I was five years old.
